title: coleus graminifolius
intro: Coleus graminifolius, also known as Java grass coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Coleus graminifolius include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Coleus graminifolius include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for topical application.
